gold: Vào được rồi. Vào được rồi.
werNormalizedGold: vào được rồi vào được rồi

sigWerErrors.reason: 'vào' (enter) is replaced by 'rồi' (already), which changes the meaning of the sentence from indicating entry to just stating 'already'. This significantly alters the intent.
Again, 'vào' (enter) is replaced by 'rồi' (already), which removes the action of entering and changes the meaning.
Omitting 'được' (can/be able to) removes the sense of ability or permission, which is crucial to the meaning of the sentence.
